name: League of Legends Wiki MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for querying the League of Legends wiki — providing AI agents access to champion data, ability descriptions, item statistics, game mechanics, patch history, and LoL gameplay information. Enables gaming-focused AI assistants to provide accurate game data from the community wiki.
use_cases: Querying champion statistics and ability descriptions for LoL coaching AI agents
Retrieving item build recommendations and synergies from gaming assistant agents
Accessing patch notes and meta changes for competitive analysis agents
Building League of Legends content creation tools with accurate game data
not_for: Non-LoL games (champions, items, mechanics are LoL-specific)
Real-time match data (wiki is static knowledge, not live game data)
Valorant, CS2, or other competitive games
best_when: A League of Legends player, coach, or content creator wants AI assistants to reference accurate champion data, item builds, and game mechanics from the official LoL wiki.
avoid_when: You need live match data, ranked statistics, or other game titles. LoL wiki provides game knowledge, not player performance data.

auth.notes: No authentication — accesses public LoL wiki via MediaWiki API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — LoL wiki is publicly accessible
pricing.notes: LoL wiki is free public community resource. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: MediaWiki API informal rate limits — be respectful

known_agent_gotchas: LoL wiki data is community-maintained — may lag behind game patches by days/weeks
Patch changes affect champion stats — specify patch version for historical accuracy
MediaWiki API response format requires parsing wiki markup for clean text
Community MCP server — not official Riot Games or wiki team product
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public gaming data — no sensitive information. HTTPS to wiki servers.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public gaming data. HTTPS. No sensitive information.
